### [choco://intel-proset-drivers](choco://intel-proset-drivers)
To use choco:// protocol URLs, install [(unofficial) choco:// Protocol support ](https://chocolatey.org/packages/choco-protocol-support)

---

Intel® PROSet/Wireless WiFi Software (includes drivers): Drivers only: This is a compressed package that includes all files required to install the wireless adapter drivers only. The zip package allows you to extract the drivers for installation on multiple systems.


**[PACKAGE NOTES](https://github.com/bcurran3/ChocolateyPackages/blob/master/intel-proset-drivers/readme.md)**
